urban_context.zoning_constraints: Sky Exposure Plane compliance, Hudson River view corridor controls, 80/20 inclusionary housing plot incentive
urban_context.project_origin: Transformation of industrial residue waterfront block into high-density hybrid residential gateway

tectonic_systems.structure: Post-Tensioned Concrete slabs with Steel Reinforced Concrete (SRC) shear walls and diagonal corner high-strength steel tie-rods
tectonic_systems.facade: Precision stamped stainless steel cladding cladding shingles on south/west slopes, unitized curtain wall glass on north/east facades
tectonic_systems.environmental_tech: Greywater collection for courtyard dynamic irrigation, low-E multi-layered double glazing, structural thermal breaks, aerodynamic wind-deflection sloped massing

stage_2_knowledge_structure.site_context: Sutures the rigid Manhattan grid with the natural edge of the Hudson River Park. Inverts the negative spatial experience of adjacent heavy infrastructure.
stage_2_knowledge_structure.scale_and_geometry: The 'Courtscraper' typology merges the European low-rise courtyard block with the American high-rise tower via parametric 3D Boolean subtraction.
stage_2_knowledge_structure.user_sociology: Implements deep socio-economic integration. Eliminates class-segregated entries ('poor doors') through unified entrance design and homogeneous floor layout.
stage_2_knowledge_structure.lifecycle_events: Demands intensive異型 surface facility maintenance solved by integrating continuous robotic window washing rails along the architectural ridge lines.
stage_2_knowledge_structure.performance_physics: The 45-degree sloped hyperbolic form acts as a structural self-shading envelope and optimizes wind tunnel flows to eliminate dangerous corner street gusts.

stage_3_ontology_mapping.category: 3. 都市邊界與交通導向 (Zoning, Context & TOD)
stage_3_ontology_mapping.causal_dialectic: Avoids the generic wedding-cake setbacks required by NYC zoning laws. The single sloped parametric surface maximizes interior GFA while perfectly clearing the legal solar envelope lines to preserve street daylight.

graphic_evidence_alignment.description: The technical section illustrates the dramatic diagonal boundary line from the 142m peak down to the waterfront, echoing the exact slope of legal sky exposure planes.

stage_3_ontology_mapping.category: 5. 空間行為學與公共利益 (Behavioral Realm & Public Benefit)
stage_3_ontology_mapping.causal_dialectic: Rejects the spatial profiling of affordable housing. Integrates subsidized units seamlessly into the same spatial layout matrix as market-rate luxury units to enforce absolute social equity.

graphic_evidence_alignment.description: The standard layout reveals uniform structural modularity and equal courtyard/river orientation access across all units, proving architectural de-stigmatization.

stage_3_ontology_mapping.category: 2. 幾何與形式生成 (Geometry & Form Generation)
stage_3_ontology_mapping.causal_dialectic: Carves out a massive volume from the block's interior to insert a micro-scale Central Park layout, ensuring natural light and views can penetrate deep into the high-density residential core.

graphic_evidence_alignment.description: The low-angle Baan photograph documents the cavernous, stepped volumetric incision tearing through the center of the metallic pyramid form.

stage_3_ontology_mapping.category: 5. 空間行為學與公共利益 (Behavioral Realm & Public Benefit)
stage_3_ontology_mapping.causal_dialectic: Combats real-estate capitalism's trend of segregated access. Channels all residents through a singular grand lobby terminal on 57th street to encourage spontaneous cross-class social contact.

graphic_evidence_alignment.description: The ground perimeter layout marks a singular massive main residential entrance terminal on 57th Street with no auxiliary poor-door pathways.

stage_3_ontology_mapping.category: 4. 構造、材料與工程實務 (Tectonics, Materials & Construction)
stage_3_ontology_mapping.causal_dialectic: Solves column alignment failures caused by the shifting sloped exterior boundary. Embedded post-tensioned cables actively eliminate structural tension and deflection, allowing wide column-free living rooms.

graphic_evidence_alignment.description: The technical facade detail explicitly charts the cross-section of the concrete deck showing high-strength PT anchoring sleeves embedded right at the skin interface.

stage_3_ontology_mapping.category: 6. 數位孿生與智能化運算 (Digital Twin & Smart Building)
stage_3_ontology_mapping.causal_dialectic: Absent due to era constraints. The facade uses a passive, static geometry with highly durable stamped stainless steel shingles rather than motorized dynamic louvers linked to an active digital twin network.

graphic_evidence_alignment.reason_of_gap: Technological choice paradigm of mid-2010s. Prioritized the tectonic durability and fluid dynamic self-shading properties of the static metal envelope over active motorized IoT digital facades.
